capability_window.capability_slice: Convert skill and route evidence into bounded local lanes that can be validated before activation.

items.name: compass-skills
items.title: COMPASS skill ecosystem route evidence
items.summary: Public skills ecosystem with skills directory, skills registry metadata, SKILL.md style workflow records, profile handoff pressure, local memory boundary pressure, and validation notes. The local route may not install, execute, write profiles, or write memory.

items.name: zhengxi-views
items.title: Generic Agent Skill workflow route evidence
items.summary: Public Agent Skill workflow evidence with SKILL.md entrypoint signals, references, validation notes, configuration hints, and no external activation request.

items.name: Qwen-AgentWorld
items.title: Qwen-AgentWorld adjacent general-agent evaluation project
items.summary: General-agent evaluation project with benchmark, environment, and agent harness material but without skill workflow route hints or local skill package layout signals.

items.name: looper
items.title: Looper adjacent general-agent loop project
items.summary: General-agent loop-control project with scheduling and review-gated loop design pressure, but without skill workflow route hints or local skill package layout signals.
